name: blog_elsewhereitem
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_elsewhereitem" (
   "id" INTEGER,
   "created" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "metadata" TEXT,
   "card_image" TEXT,
   "is_draft" INTEGER,
   "item_type" TEXT,
   "external_url" TEXT,
   "title" TEXT,
   "commentary" TEXT,
   "image_url" TEXT,
   "series_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "blog_series"("id")
)
